description: Grabbable Grabber is a Protoflux node that takes an IGrabbable (any kind of grabbable) and gets the grabber that is currently grabbing it. usually this will be a limb capable of grasping around an object, and holding it like a hand, or a monkey's foot.

fields.Grabbable: The grabbable that should be checked for a grabber that is grabbing it.
fields.* ([[Type:Grabber|Grabber]]): The Grabber that is currently grabbing Grabbable (IGrabbable).
